description: A dashboard to show information relevant to the ROCm(tm) AMD Infinity Context System using for KV Cache block management and prefill offload via storage.

spec.description: LMCache RPC-style request rates (store, lookup, retrieve) from lmcache:num_*_requests_total (job=lmcache-exporter).
spec.title: LMCache — store / lookup / retrieve request rate

spec.description: Token throughput for LMCache store, lookup, and hit paths.
spec.title: LMCache — stored / lookup / hit token throughput

spec.expr:
sum(rate(lmcache:num_hit_tokens_total{job="lmcache-exporter",instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) by (instance, model_name, worker_id)
/ sum(rate(lmcache:num_lookup_tokens_total{job="lmcache-exporter",instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) by (instance, model_name, worker_id)

spec.description: LMCache token-level hit ratio: hit tokens divided by lookup tokens.
spec.title: LMCache — token hit ratio (hit / lookup)

spec.description: vLLM request scheduler pressure: represented by running vs waiting requests from the outside world.
spec.title: vLLM — Requests

spec.description: GPU KV cache utilization as a 0–1 fraction from vllm:kv_cache_usage_perc.
spec.title: vLLM — KV cache usage (0–1)

spec.description: Total power delivered to the server running vLLM.
spec.title: Server and GPU Power

spec.description: The activity factor of the CUs in the GPU. This is given as a percentage of total compute power avaliable.
spec.title: GPU GFX Activity

spec.description: Total number of 512-byte data units read from the NVMe device by the host.
spec.title: NVMe Data Units Read and Written

spec.description: Prefix cache effectiveness: hits divided by queries using vllm:prefix_cache_* counters over $__rate_interval.
spec.title: vLLM — prefix cache token hit ratio

spec.description: External prefix cache (LMCache / KV connector) hit ratio from vllm:external_prefix_cache_* counters.
spec.title: vLLM — external prefix cache hit ratio (KV connector / LMCache)

spec.description: Time-to-first-token latency from vllm:time_to_first_token_seconds_bucket; p50 and p99 quantiles over $__rate_interval.
spec.title: vLLM — time to first token (histogram)

spec.description: Query arrival rates for prefix and external prefix cache paths.
spec.title: vLLM — prefix / external prefix query rate

title: ROCm(tm) AMD Infinity Context Dashboard
